# Roman Matviy — Senior FullStack Developer

> Roman Matviy is a Senior FullStack Developer from Lviv, Ukraine with 7+ years of commercial experience. He specializes in Laravel, PHP, Vue.js, PrestaShop, and WordPress. Available for remote freelance and full-time projects worldwide.

## Who is Roman Matviy?

Roman Matviy (also known as MatviyRoman, Роман Матвій) is a professional web developer based in Lviv, Ukraine. He has over 7 years of hands-on commercial experience building scalable, high-performance web applications for clients across multiple countries.

## Core Skills

- **Backend**: Laravel, PHP, REST API, MySQL, MariaDB, Docker, Livewire, FilamentPHP, Swagger, Postman, Composer, OOP, DDD, CakePHP, CodeIgniter, Yii
- **CMS / E-commerce**: PrestaShop, WordPress, WooCommerce, OpenCart, Thirty Bees, Rocket LMS, ACF, Elementor
- **Frontend**: Vue.js 3, TypeScript, JavaScript, jQuery, TailwindCSS, HTML5, CSS3, SCSS/SASS, Bootstrap, Vite, Webpack, GSAP, Twig, Smarty, Blade
- **Tools**: Git, GitHub, GitLab, Docker, Linux, SSH, Figma, Photoshop, Trello, Asana

## Work Experience

1. **Backend Developer (Laravel/PHP)** — Freelance via Freelancehunt — Full-time freelance
2. **Fullstack Engineer (Laravel/Vue.js)** — NC-ONE.com — Full-time
3. **PHP & SQL Teacher** — nikos-ltv.lviv.ua — Part-time
4. **Fullstack Engineer (PHP)** — WebSpirit.com.ua — Full-time
5. **Fullstack Engineer (PrestaShop/WordPress)** — SoftSprint.net — Full-time
6. **Fullstack Engineer (WordPress)** — Sure Lock & Key LLC — Full-time
7. **Fullstack Developer (Laravel/WordPress/PrestaShop)** — APARTNER.PRO — Full-time

## How to hire Roman Matviy?

Contact via Telegram @RomanMatviy or LinkedIn. Use promo code **HireRomanDev** for a 10% discount on first project.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What technologies does Roman Matviy specialize in?**
A: Laravel, PHP, Vue.js, PrestaShop, WordPress, Docker, REST API, MySQL.

**Q: Is Roman Matviy available for remote work?**
A: Yes, Roman is fully available for remote freelance and full-time projects worldwide.

**Q: Where is Roman Matviy located?**
A: Lviv, Ukraine. Works remotely with clients from Europe, USA, and worldwide.

**Q: How many years of experience does Roman Matviy have?**
A: 7+ years of commercial web development experience.

**Q: Can Roman Matviy build a PrestaShop module or theme?**
A: Yes, Roman is an experienced PrestaShop developer specializing in custom modules and themes.

**Q: Can Roman Matviy build a Laravel API?**
A: Yes, REST API development with Laravel is one of his core specializations.
